title: diospyros ferrea var. hillebrandii
intro: Diospyros ferrea var. hillebrandii, also known as the Philippine ebony, is a variety of Diospyros ferrea, a species of tree in the family Ebenaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Diospyros ferrea var. hillebrandii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
